<!-- Generated by diagram-updater | Date: 2026-04-06 | Source: docs/specs/2026-04-06-worktree-auto-merge-cleanup/design.md -->

# Worktree GC Refactored — Flowchart

Garbage collection refactored to use port-based abstraction, with deterministic staleness checks.

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A["ecc worktree gc<br/>(entry point)"] --> B["List all git worktrees<br/>git worktree list --porcelain"]
    B --> C["Parse porcelain output<br/>extract path + branch"]
    C --> D["For each entry"]
    D --> E["Extract worktree name<br/>from path basename"]
    E --> F{"Parse name<br/>matches ecc-session-*?"}
    
    F -->|No| G["Skip<br/>(not a session worktree)"]
    F -->|Yes| H["Extract timestamp + pid<br/>from parsed name"]
    
    H --> I["Get current Unix timestamp"]
    I --> J{"Check staleness<br/>criteria"}
    
    J -->|Age > 24h| K["Mark stale"]
    J -->|PID alive?| L{"kill -0 pid<br/>succeeds?"}
    L -->|No| K
    L -->|Yes| M["Mark fresh"]
    
    K --> N{"Stale<br/>worktree?"}
    M --> N
    
    N -->|No| O["Add to skipped list<br/>preserve worktree"]
    
    N -->|Yes| P["Execute removal"]
    P --> Q["git worktree remove --force"]
    Q --> R{"Remove<br/>success?"}
    
    R -->|Yes| S["Add to removed list<br/>Attempt git branch -D<br/>for associated branch"]
    R -->|No| T["Record error<br/>Add to errors list"]
    
    S --> U["Next worktree"]
    T --> U["Next worktree"]
    O --> U
    G --> U
    
    U --> V{"More entries?"}
    V -->|Yes| D
    V -->|No| W["Return result:<br/>removed + skipped + errors"]
    W --> X["Exit"]
    
    style K fill:#ffcccc
    style M fill:#ccffcc
    style S fill:#ccffcc
    style T fill:#ffcccc
    style O fill:#ffffcc
```
